falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises by more than 15% from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the pattern's historical context (bottom formation) and invalidate the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate extreme volatility/momentum, directly contradicting the current low blowoff score (38) and suggesting a different market phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price breaks below the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant breakdown below a key technical level would invalidate the pattern's implied support structure and the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
